calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-09-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Appearances:
Robert Yohannan, Esq. for Petitioner Yvonne Marshall present as guardian ad litem for Albert Malbrough, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Medical Expenses of $ 1,247.00
Costs of $249.80
Attorney's fees: $580.00
The Balance of the settlement proceeds of $1,173.20 shall be disbursed to the Petitioner, $673.20 to be held in trust for the benefit of the Minor and $500.00 to be allowed for immediate use.
Proposed order received in court and matter is under submission.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Continued To Jan-12-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
